title: rhododendron decandrum
intro:
Rhododendron decandrum, also known as the May bush or button bush, is a flowering shrub native to North America, characterized by its clusters of small, pink or white flowers and its dense, rounded growth habit.

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron decandrum include its potential to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
